evidence_summary: Establish the biological threat and alien lifecycle through close-up observation of the incubator contents. The visual progression must move from curiosity regarding the eggs to visceral horror at the hatched creatures.

The protagonist explores a nearby glass-roofed enclosure. Inside, he observes hundreds of large white eggs, some of which have hatched into grotesque, six-limbed creatures with antennae and independent eyes.
Protagonist approaches the circular basin area toward the enclosure.
Protagonist observes grotesque, six-limbed creatures through the glass.
Exploration of the incubator leading to discovery of hatching alien life.
